'''soyayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaken|oaken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaken|oaken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| soyayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyayithi|soyayithi]] || [[word:soyayiji|soyayiji]] || [[word:soyayishi|soyayishi]] || [[word:soyayiki|soyayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyayuthuthu|soyayuthuthu]] || [[word:soyayujuju|soyayujuju]] || [[word:soyayushushu|soyayushushu]] || [[word:soyayukuku|soyayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyayuthu|soyayuthu]] || [[word:soyayuju|soyayuju]] || [[word:soyayushu|soyayushu]] || [[word:soyayuku|soyayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyayufthuf|soyayufthuf]] || [[word:soyayufjuf|soyayufjuf]] || [[word:soyayufshuf|soyayufshuf]] || [[word:soyayufkuf|soyayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyayethe|soyayethe]] || [[word:soyayeje|soyayeje]] || [[word:soyayeshe|soyayeshe]] || [[word:soyayeke|soyayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyayothotho|soyayothotho]] || [[word:soyayojojo|soyayojojo]] || [[word:soyayoshosho|soyayoshosho]] || [[word:soyayokoko|soyayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyayotho|soyayotho]] || [[word:soyayojo|soyayojo]] || [[word:soyayosho|soyayosho]] || [[word:soyayoko|soyayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyayofthof|soyayofthof]] || [[word:soyayofjof|soyayofjof]] || [[word:soyayofshof|soyayofshof]] || [[word:soyayofkof|soyayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfthÃŸf|soyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfjÃŸf|soyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfshÃŸf|soyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfkÃŸf|soyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|soyayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|soyayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|soyayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|soyayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfthÃŸf|soyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfjÃŸf|soyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfshÃŸf|soyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfkÃŸf|soyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfthÃŸf|soyayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfjÃŸf|soyayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfshÃŸf|soyayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:soyayÃŸfkÃŸf|soyayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyayÃḊthÃḊ|soyayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:soyayÃḊjÃḊ|soyayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:soyayÃḊshÃḊ|soyayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:soyayÃḊkÃḊ|soyayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyayathatha|soyayathatha]] || [[word:soyayajaja|soyayajaja]] || [[word:soyayashasha|soyayashasha]] || [[word:soyayakaka|soyayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyayatha|soyayatha]] || [[word:soyayaja|soyayaja]] || [[word:soyayasha|soyayasha]] || [[word:soyayaka|soyayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyayafthaf|soyayafthaf]] || [[word:soyayafjaf|soyayafjaf]] || [[word:soyayafshaf|soyayafshaf]] || [[word:soyayafkaf|soyayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:soyayasha|soyayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyayshÃḋsha|soyayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyayrosha|soyayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyaymusha|soyaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyayasha|soyayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyaynkshÃḋsha|gosoyaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyaynkrosha|gosoyaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyaynkmusha|gosoyaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyaynkyasha|gosoyaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:soyayayasha|soyayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyayayshÃḋsha|soyayayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyayayrosha|soyayayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyayaymusha|soyayaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyayayasha|soyayayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyayaynkshÃḋsha|gosoyayaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyayaynkrosha|gosoyayaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyayaynkmusha|gosoyayaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyayaynkyasha|gosoyayaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:seyÃḊyasha|seyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:seyÃḊyshÃḋsha|seyÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:seyÃḊyrosha|seyÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:seyÃḊymusha|seyÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:seyÃḊyasha|seyÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goseyÃḊynkshÃḋsha|goseyÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goseyÃḊynkrosha|goseyÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goseyÃḊynkmusha|goseyÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goseyÃḊynkyasha|goseyÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:soyfayasha|soyfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyfayshÃḋsha|soyfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyfayrosha|soyfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyfaymusha|soyfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyfayasha|soyfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyfaynkshÃḋsha|gosoyfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyfaynkrosha|gosoyfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyfaynkmusha|gosoyfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyfaynkyasha|gosoyfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
